task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or user profile indicates that 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' is logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct FOIA case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case title 'FOIA-Correspondence-Test-2025' is visible in the case viewer or header.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the creation of a 'Response Letter' or 'Letter' correspondence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A correspondence creation modal or page is open with the type 'Response Letter' or 'Letter' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct subject for the correspondence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject field in the correspondence form contains exactly 'Official Response - Records Request Determination'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body text area contains the required text, specifically including the phrases 'Freedom of Information Act' and 'releasable in full'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correspondence was saved to the case record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the newly created correspondence appears in the list of items/correspondences for the case 'FOIA-Correspondence-Test-2025'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ArkCase web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the text into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs are within the ArkCase correspondence form, not a separate text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the correspondence is genuinely saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The correspondence is visible in the case's correspondence list or history, rather than just being typed into an unsaved draft.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Title: FOIA-Correspondence-Test-2025. Target Subject: 'Official Response - Records Request Determination'. Required Body Snippets: 'Freedom of Information Act' and 'releasable in full'. Admin User: arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com.
